subject: [PATCH v2 3/3] cgroup: replace global cgroup_file_kn_lock with per-cgroup_file lock

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's impact on existing code, specifically the removal of the global cgroup_file_kn_lock. Suggested that the patch should not be merged without addressing these issues.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series replaces the global cgroup_file_kn_lock with a per-cgroup_file spinlock to eliminate cross-cgroup contention and improve performance.
